deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale cash deal at $152,000. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature at mobile notary. Cleared and funded Apr 26, officially closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Deliver Joy gift basket plus rug and trolley. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel and Chelsey Bongiovi. Confirm commission received.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Joy gift delivery, rug, and trolley still pending.
Cleared, funded, and closed.
Follow-up email sent to Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Release delivered to Alyssa Castillo. Joy signed at UPS Store.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo — family member of lien holder Fernando Castillo. Phone 830-200-8030.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez — Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. First offer (Michael Rodriguez / RBFCU) dead — no earnest money received. Clearing complete. New prospect interested in subdividing or alternate use reached out May 9.
deals.next: Follow up with new prospect who wants to show the property. Arrange drone footage for upgraded marketing. Lead with net after close on any new offer.

logs.m: Steve sent new photos. New prospect reached out wanting to show it — interested in subdividing or alternate use. Strategy communicated: land-only cash deal.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer confirmed dead. Drone footage flagged as next content priority.
Current offer basically dead — option money not received. Steve clearing property. Key message going forward: net after close is what matters.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. HouzzPro (Matt Toney, $54,877) selected over T&T (Kendall, $61,980). Jerry Sadler connected Matt Toney with bank directly. Dumpsters running since Saturday May 10. Chris on-site today May 11 to meet Matt Toney and project manager.
deals.next: Meet Matt Toney and PM on-site today. Monitor work progress. Establish listing timeline once rehab scope is underway.

logs.m: Chris heading to property to meet Matt Toney and project manager on site. Dumpsters running since Saturday.
Work officially starting — Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met with Matt Toney in his office. Connected him directly with Jerry Sadler (Priority Bank) on a phone call. Goal: work starts by next Monday.
Two estimates compared: HouzzPro $54,877 vs T&T $61,980. Jerry Sadler emailed Ray Stidham recommending HouzzPro. Ray Stidham confirmed as bank decision-maker.
Kelly confirmed damage occurred after bank possession in December — not before. Met Matt Van Gorder on-site for estimate.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Residential listing. Underwater by $93K-$143K before selling costs. Payoff approx $493K, market value $350K-$400K. Sellers double-carrying with Pearl Brewery apartment plus $2,843.85/month VA mortgage. 208+ DOM. Showing by outside agent May 5. Checking on property May 11 while in Devine.
deals.next: Get showing feedback from May 5 showing. Resolve lawn care. Have frank three-path conversation with Matt and Chandler: short sale, VA assumption, or price reduction plus cash to close.

logs.m: Chris checking on property while in Devine for 181 CR visit. Still need showing feedback from May 5. Grass still unresolved.
Dropping sign and lockbox at property when in Devine. Keep marketing.
Buyer showing at 2pm by outside agent. Lawn care referral from Garry Stephens: Morales Tree Trimming 830-444-7804. AM Lawn Care also visiting for quote.
Express Offers returned $550K — likely off given CMA. Showing scheduled May 4 at 2pm.
Full market analysis completed. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Three paths identified: short sale, VA assumption, or price reduction plus cash to close.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell
deals.notes: Rental being sold by landlord — duplex renovated, rents going up. Pivoting to new construction with no HOA requirement. Pre-approval in progress with Zach Schaphorst. Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy on Apr 16.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval amount with Zach Schaphorst. Identify no-HOA new construction communities. Schedule model home visits.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for new construction browsing. Pre-approval in progress with Zach.
Text from Mike — rental being sold. 916 Marriott assessed and passed. Pivoting entirely to new construction with rate buydowns and no HOA.

deals.notes: Prior clients — VA renovation loan purchase. Going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell. Colton also being considered for contractor work at 181 CR 7751.
deals.next: Reach out to Colton to confirm listing timeline and renovation status. Get his quote and availability for 181 CR 7751. Check if Moore TX needs a referral agent.

logs.m: File updated. Colton being considered for 181 CR 7751 contractor work. Connection to Kendall noted through prior renovation project.

deals.title: Kurt — 9815 Conbes
deals.notes: Neighbor around the corner from 9815 Conbes. That listing is under contract at $275,000. Kurt wants intel on offers received. Possible seller or buyer lead.
deals.next: Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes for offer details. Report back to Kurt. Determine if he is a potential seller or buyer.

logs.m: Neighbor Kurt spoke with Chris about 9815 Conbes listing. Under contract at $275K. Wants offer details.

deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip analysis for Homestead Vested. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. CMA pulled — avg sale price $207K, estimated value $266K. Used to build branded property analysis template.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report. Feed data to Sirhc to build first analysis sheet. Lock template for reuse on next deal.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via homesteadvested.com. Used as basis for building the property analysis tool. Numbers pulled.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers relocating to NC by second week of June. Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG Photography. Going live Wednesday May 13. Recommended list price $259,900. Hairline foundation crack flagged for disclosure.
deals.next: Canvass neighborhood and drop sign and lockbox Tuesday May 12. Go live on MLS Wednesday May 13.

logs.m: Neighborhood canvassing moved to Tuesday May 12. Sign and lockbox drop also Tuesday.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live Wednesday May 13.
Pre-inspection scheduled 8:30 AM with Coach Ricky Smith. Chris arriving around 10 AM to review findings with sellers.
Listing consultation on-site. Met Isaac and Jose and Katherine. Seller packet delivered. Foundation crack discussed. Post-meeting lunch with Isaac and Adam.
CMA completed — recommended list price $259,900. Best comp 12015 Agnew Ridge sold $252K in 25 DOM. June deadline supports this price.

Jennifer Ball (co-owner) took initiative and hired attorney.

Updated sisters on Apr 20 showing. Discussed Isaac development interest — $150K offer concept with half units for veterans. Sisters enthusiastic.
Showing occurred. Dedicated call block for Borregas prospects.

Referral received Apr 16. Met Apr 17-18. Immediate referral — 10023 Mill Path. Strong cross-referral potential.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Paying $1,700/month in rent. Military retirement income. Two daughters with disability checks live with her. Actively fixing credit. VA loan likely eligible zero down. Connected via Nextdoor High Country Apr 8.
leads.next: Call or text today. Check in on grandkid first, then ease back into home conversation. Connect with VA lender once ready.

logs.m: Spoke today — sick grandkid, not right moment. Warm conversation. Following up Apr 30.
No response yet to Apr 13 text. Still hot — VA eligibility and motivation strong.
Confirmed military retirement and daughters living with her. Follow-up text sent mentioning VA benefits and zero down.
Connected on Nextdoor. Post: $1,700/month rent, retirement and disability income, between jobs, fixing credit.

leads.detail: 18 years old, finishing senior year. Interested in getting into real estate. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer lead) during Apr 30 conversation. Julie is the connection — her daughter is with Jahsia.

logs.m: Referred by Julie during morning call. Young, motivated. Worth a conversation about licensing and eXp.
